name: Sunrise Mobile & Recharge
notes: Onboarded last month. Doing AePS withdrawals smoothly. Asked about cash-back scheme on last call and seemed happy.

name: Maa Vaishno Kirana Store
open_issue: Wants help enabling DMT (money transfer) on the app.
notes: We sent KYC steps over WhatsApp 10 days ago. No reply yet. Volume has been flat.

name: Khan Telecom Point
open_issue: Settlement of 4,300 INR pending for 3 days; partner is upset.
notes: High-volume distributor. Last message: 'paisa abhi tak nahi aaya, customers wait kar rahe hain'. Risk of churn — competitor agent in same market.

name: Janseva CSC Kendra
notes: Reported hardware issue. We promised a callback from support; not sure if it happened. Good partner otherwise.

name: New Bharat Mobile
notes: Was active, then went silent. Three follow-ups, no response. Might have switched to another platform.

name: Shree Ganesh Communications
open_issue: Asked when the next incentive payout lands.
notes: Routine query, partner is active and positive. Just wants payout date confirmation.

name: Annapurna Digital Seva
notes: Strong, growing centre. Last interaction was a training request for a new staff member, which we scheduled.
